name: Purple Plum Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and halve the plums; remove pits.
2. Place plums in a large saucepan with 1/4 cup water.
3. Cover and simmer over low heat until tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Puree plum pulp and liquid in a blender.
5. Measure 2 cups puree, adding water if necessary.
6. Add sugar and lemon juice; stir until sugar is dissolved.
7. Soften gelatin in 1/4 cup cold water.
8. Dissolve gelatin over hot water.
9. Chill mixture until slightly thickened.
10. Beat egg whites with salt until stiff but not dry.
11. Fold egg whites and whipped cream into plum mixture.
12. Pile into pastry shell.
13. Chill until firm.
14. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
Makes 1 pie (9").
